title: AW3S0FT Technologies
description: Palladium Addonpacks that adds various things that AW3S0FT (made up company) has developed!
body:
# Introduction

AW3S0FT Inc has started production on several new products, most notably: The AW3SUIT, and the AW3Smart watch.

AW3S0FT Inc and the AW3SUIT has no relation in any way to Stark Industries and the "Ironman" suit.



# What is this?

This is a addonpack for ThreeTAG's [Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium) mod, which adds various "technologies" most notably: The Exosuit which is similar to Ironman, but with my own spin on it

# How do I get them?

Currently, this addonpack is a work in progress, but when it's done, it should be all craftable, to see the recipes use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) or [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)



# What's planned?

Currently, Exosuits MK1, MK2, and MK3 are planned, more are planned, but I'm not sure on the ideas of them



There's also other stuff planned like:

catnip estrogen pills - turns you into a demi-human cat with several new abilities (comes in many colors)

AW3Smart watch - shows various things and comes with various abilities.
